tests.tooltip_resultado_desc: Indicates if all test assertions passed (PASSED) or if there was a failure (FAILED).
tests.tooltip_duracao_desc: Total processing duration of the test, including setup and teardown.
tests.expandido_sucesso: Test passed successfully. No action required.

cargowise.eadaptor_desc: eAdaptor is the official CargoWise One bus for XML data exchange. Gravity uses it to send DI/DUE declarations, shipping documents and process data in a standardized and traceable way. The XML below is automatically generated from your process.

store.voltar_hub_desc: Return to the workspace main screen
store.hero_sub: Discover intelligent modules designed to scale your business with efficiency and centralized data.
store.stack_sub: Combine the modules that make sense for your operation
store.stack_hint: Activate your first module below to start building your Gravity
store.modulo_desc_fallback: Specialized module for the Gravity platform.
store.footer_texto: © {{ano}} Gravity Platform · All modules include priority support.
store.smart_read_desc: Intelligent data extraction from documents and images using AI. Automatically processes invoices and customs documents.
store.nf_pro_desc: Advanced version of NF Import with support for special regimes, drawback, and SISCOMEX customs system integration.
store.prod_bid_frete_desc: Smart international freight quoting and bidding with multiple suppliers in real time.
store.prod_bid_cambio_desc: Exchange rate consultation and comparison with Central Bank data across multiple currencies.
store.prod_nf_importacao_desc: Automated import invoice processing with SEFAZ validation and NCM tax calculation.
store.prod_lpco_desc: Management of Licenses, Permits, Certificates and Others (LPCO) integrated with SISCOMEX and automatic balance tracking.
store.prod_pedido_desc: Complete purchase order management with approval workflow, tracking and ERP system integration.
store.prod_simula_custo_desc: Detailed import cost simulation with automatic tax calculation by NCM code and scenario comparison.
store.prod_smart_read_desc: Intelligent data extraction from documents and images using AI. Automatically processes invoices and customs documents.
